user.title: Netgear LTE SMS Manager
user.description: Set up SMS inbox management for your Netgear LTE modem.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to check the modem inbox for new messages (seconds).
data_description.auto_opt_out: Look for unsubscribe keywords to opt out and auto delete spam messages.
data_description.welcome_message: Message sent to new trusted senders when they are added.
data_description.auto_cleanup: Automatically delete oldest messages when the inbox approaches the modem limit (keeps newest 10, triggers at 18 messages).
data_description.llm_matching: When enabled, uses Ollama to interpret SMS messages and match them to predefined commands. Only runs when keyword matching finds no match. Requires Ollama configured as a Home Assistant conversation agent. Falls back silently if unavailable.

list_inbox.name: List SMS Inbox
list_inbox.description: List all SMS messages in the modem inbox.

host.name: Modem Host
host.description: IP address of the modem (auto-detected if only one configured).

delete_sms.name: Delete SMS
delete_sms.description: Delete one or more SMS messages by ID.

host.name: Modem Host
host.description: IP address of the modem (auto-detected if only one configured).

sms_id.name: SMS ID(s)
sms_id.description: Message ID or list of message IDs to delete.

cleanup_inbox.name: Cleanup Inbox
cleanup_inbox.description: Clean up the modem SMS inbox using policy options (retain count, age, whitelist).

host.name: Modem Host
host.description: The modem to clean up (auto-detected if only one configured).

retain_count.name: Retain count
retain_count.description: Number of newest messages to keep (default 24).

retain_days.name: Retain days
retain_days.description: Keep messages newer than this many days (0 = ignore).

whitelist.name: Whitelist
whitelist.description: List of senders (numbers or names) that should never be deleted.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: If true, only report what would be deleted without deleting.

get_inbox_json.name: Get Inbox JSON
get_inbox_json.description: Get inbox as JSON data (for template sensors and integrations).

host.name: Modem Host
host.description: IP address of the modem (auto-detected if only one configured).

send_welcome.name: Send welcome
send_welcome.description: Send the welcome message to this number after adding.

host.name: Modem Host
host.description: IP address of the modem (auto-detected if only one configured).

update_contact.name: Update Contact
update_contact.description: Update the name and/or number of an existing trusted sender contact.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: UUID of the contact to update.

remove_contact.name: Remove Contact
remove_contact.description: Remove a trusted sender contact by their UUID.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: UUID of the contact to remove.

send_welcome.name: Send Welcome Message
send_welcome.description: Send the configured welcome message to a phone number.

number.name: Phone number
number.description: Phone number to send the welcome message to.

host.name: Modem Host
host.description: IP address of the modem (auto-detected if only one configured).

add_command.name: Add Command
add_command.description: Add an SMS command that triggers a Home Assistant service call.

name.name: Name
name.description: Friendly name for this command (e.g. 'lock front door').

keywords.name: Keywords
keywords.description: Words or phrases that trigger this command (e.g. 'lock', 'lock door').

service.name: Service
service.description: HA service to call, e.g. lock.lock or cover.open_cover.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: Entity to act on, e.g. lock.front_door_lock.

service_data.name: Service data
service_data.description: Optional extra data passed to the service call as a dict.

reply_ok.name: Success reply
reply_ok.description: SMS confirmation sent back to the sender on success.

reply_fail.name: Failure reply
reply_fail.description: SMS sent back to the sender if the command fails.

update_command.name: Update Command
update_command.description: Update an existing SMS command definition.

command_id.name: Command ID
command_id.description: UUID of the command to update.

remove_command.name: Remove Command
remove_command.description: Remove an SMS command by its UUID.

command_id.name: Command ID
command_id.description: UUID of the command to remove.

test_command.name: Test Command
test_command.description: Test command dispatch with a synthetic message. Bypasses the new-message check — useful for verifying commands without waiting for a real SMS.

message.name: Message
message.description: SMS text to match against commands (e.g. 'lock').

sender.name: Sender
sender.description: Phone number — must be a trusted contact.

host.name: Modem Host
host.description: IP address of the modem (auto-detected if only one configured).

send_reply.name: Send reply
send_reply.description: Send the reply SMS back to the sender (default true).
